summary: VICI close Jan 16 vs Jan 6: ~47% probability of being higher based on GBM, Monte Carlo, and macro analysis
content: Reference price: $28.13 (Jan 6 close). 10 trading days. Recent 3-month drift is strongly negative (-15.7% annualized). Rising rates (10Y at 4.61%, up 42bp/3mo) are headwinds for REITs. VNQ down 6.3% in 3 months. Historical base rate for 10-day up is 54.6% but recent regime drags this down. Weighted estimate: ~47%.
